name: Chicken (or Lamb) in Pomegranate Sauce (Khoresht-e Fesenjan
recipeIngredient: 1 large fryer chicken or 5 whole chicken breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions in 2 tbsp. of butter until golden brown. Remove from the pan.
2. Add 3 more tablespoons of butter and saute the chicken pieces until light brown.
3. Add the bouillon and sauteed onions. Cover and simmer gently for 30 minutes.
4. Cook and bone the chicken.
5. Prepare the sauce by stirring the water into the ground walnuts.
6. Stir in the pomegranate syrup and sugar, and simmer gently over a low heat for 10-15 minutes.
7. Combine the cooked, boned chicken and most of its drippings with the walnut sauce; add the seasonings and lemon juice.
8. Cover and simmer gently for another hour.
9. Adjust the seasonings by adding a little sugar if too sour, or more pomegranate syrup if too sweet.
10. The chicken pieces should be coated with a rich, dark, sweet-sour sauce; there should be plenty of thick sauce.
11. Serve with rice.
